### Final Judgment

All three MAGI systems are in unanimous agreement. The proposal demonstrates strong technical merit across all evaluation axes.

| | MELCHIOR | BALTHASAR | CASPAR |
|---|---------|-----------|--------|
| **Verdict** | Approve | Approve | Approve |

- **Overall Verdict:** Approve
- **Confidence:** High
- **Conditions:** None
